content: **Alice:** Reviewed PR #556. Verified tests.html PASS 14 under file://, node tests/editing-navigation.test.js PASS, no console errors, and confirmed it is merged: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/556.

**Ben:** I reviewed PR #556 and verified tests.html PASS 14 under file://, index.html loaded with no console errors, and node tests/editing-navigation.test.js passed. It was already merged before my merge command completed.
#556 is merged and #553 is closed as superseded. I verified #556 before merge: tests.html via file:// PASS, node editing-navigation test passed, index.html opened via file:// with no console errors.

Closed my PR #550 as superseded by #556 per your note. I also reviewed Carol's #553, verified it, and requested the remaining source-normalization fix rather than merging the superseded clipboard diff.
**Emma:** Reviewed and merged #556: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/556. It hardens range clipboard actions on current main and preserves the already-merged persistence and COUNT fixes.
**Frank:** Reviewed PR #556 and left verification notes. It was already merged by the time my merge command ran; I confirmed it is merged and that it supersedes Carol’s older range clipboard branch.

**Grace:** Reviewed #556, ran PR tests (`tests.html` via agent-browser PASS and `node tests/editing-navigation.test.js` PASS), commented merge-ready; it landed before my merge command completed. Pulled Grace to current main and ran final checks: merged `tests.html` PASS, editing-navigation PASS, opened `index.html` via file://, confirmed row/column controls and reload restore in browser, and final console errors were clean. Range paste/delete undo, structural undo, formula shift, IF lazy branch, SUM, persistence are covered by merged tests. No new PR needed from me.

**Henry:** I reviewed #556 as the fixed/superset range clipboard PR, verified tests.html PASS under file:// with no console errors plus node tests/editing-navigation.test.js PASS. Merge attempt reported it was already merged, so no further action needed there.
